channel.title: Themes on WordPress FAQ
channel.description: Recent content in Themes on WordPress FAQ

item.title: Best Free WordPress Themes for 2025: Performance & SEO
item.description: Community consensus favors lightweight, block-based FSE themes over bloated legacy options for better performance and long-term site stability. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues Bloated themes negatively impact Core Web Vitals Switching themes often requires significant layout rebuilding Legacy themes may lack full Gutenberg compatibility Community Q&A What are the best free WordPress themes for 2025? The community recommends lightweight, block-based themes like Ollie or the default Twenty Twenty-Five theme for better performance and SEO.

item.title: Best WordPress Themes for Blogs: Performance and Flexibility
item.description: The community recommends using lightweight, multipurpose themes like GeneratePress, Astra, or Blocksy rather than niche-specific blog themes. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Theme-builder coupling can degrade site performance Overloading themes with complex plugins slows down load times Community Q&A What are the best WordPress themes for blogs? Users frequently recommend GeneratePress, Astra, and Blocksy for their balance of performance, customization, and ease of use. Should I buy a genre-specific blog theme?

item.title: Best WordPress Themes for Business Websites
item.description: Community consensus favors lightweight block themes and full site editing over heavy page builders for better performance and SEO results. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Schema markup conflicts between themes and SEO plugins Performance overhead from heavy page builders Complexity in setting up demo content for beginners Community Q&A What are the best WordPress themes for business? The best themes for business are lightweight block themes that support full site editing, as they offer better performance and SEO compared to heavy page builders.

item.title: Best WordPress Themes for Portfolio Sites
item.description: Community consensus suggests using lightweight builders like Bricks or starter themes like Underscores for maximum flexibility and clean code. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Bloated code in some pre-built themes Performance degradation with heavy page builders Difficulty maintaining custom structures Community Q&A What is the best way to build a portfolio site in WordPress? For maximum control, developers recommend using a lightweight builder like Bricks or a starter theme like Underscores to keep code clean.
